basic_details.job_title: DLSA Narsinghpur Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Narsinghpur (DLSA Narsinghpur)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Narsinghpur (DLSA Narsinghpur) Recruitment 2026: District Legal Services Authority Narsinghpur has released the official notification for 1 Vehicle Driver posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age will be calculated as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass from Recognized Board, Valid Driving License, Experience in Driving All Types of Vehicles, Preference to Automobile Mechanic
qualification.details: 10th pass from recognized board. Valid Driving License. Experience in driving all types of vehicles. Preference will be given to candidates with automobile mechanic skills.

selection_process: Screening of Applications Interview Practical Driving Test
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: narsinghpur.dcourts.gov.in
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Narsinghpur Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the DLSA Narsinghpur Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 is 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Vehicle Driver post in the District Legal Services Authority Narsinghpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th class from a recognized board and possess a valid driving license, along with experience in driving all types of vehicles.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Vehicle Driver position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Vehicle Driver post is between 18 years and 35 years, as of 1st January 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 12,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Vehicle Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes screening of applications, followed by an interview and a practical driving test.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the DLSA Narsinghpur Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline by downloading the form from the official website and sending it along with required documents to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for DLSA Narsinghpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for DLSA Narsinghpur recruitment is https://district.mphc.gov.in/en/recruitment-result.

faq.question: Q10. Does the recruitment mention any preference for candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have experience as an automobile mechanic.
